{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133047996AD9B733C02C5A4123"}"},"total":224},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7360273689416581913","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看完了   好看～这么短就没了  快点加更～整体不错，情节和设定有点小遐思啦～无关紧要～主角科研没有那么细致，感觉处理的不错。  看其他主角研究个东西恨不得花上几章，妹的我感兴趣不会现实里自己查啊～～～希望作者大大安自己的步骤写下去～其他人的想法当参考就行～看这本书我能带入进去，畅游在小说故事里这作品我觉的就不错～希望作者加油～其他同伴，快节奏小说就不用那么高要求啦，带脑子看很累的～"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713835831,"group_id":"7342767203214707774","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只想活在二次元～我还没毕业～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwqLMP2n8OCj2QzckCS9I5E=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2b6d07cefb1d45dc96a3da7aec56ef94~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617463&x-signature=wRuNSPAeKDVtLjRfh58QuseB8NU%3D","user_id":"6356128177","user_name":"南街的沐木"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"6356128177","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1764399556,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7342767203214707774","book_info":{"abstract":"李奇穿越到了神辉大陆。
他建农庄、开矿山、办工厂，身家数亿。
但他出身低微，没有靠山，事业陷入瓶颈。
恰逢女帝选夫，想抱大腿的李奇去试了试。
面对女帝出的“如何让宿敌和解”难题，李奇一招千古阳谋“情报对账”，女帝麻了。
之后又屡为女帝出谋划策，解决诸多难题，这才得到女帝青睐，钦点成为皇夫。
婚后女帝忙于国事，一心想强大帝国，对李奇不冷不热。
李奇乐的清净，不断拓展自己的商业版图，事业越做越大。
某天，女帝得知自己的丈夫，每年至少赚数百亿龙元，远超帝国财政岁入时。
在李奇面前，女帝褪去高冷外表，变的热情主动起来。
女帝：“夫君，帝国财政吃紧，借我十亿应急，等朕有钱了一定还你。”
李奇：“行，但是得写欠条，另外把皇家商会交给我打理。”
女帝：“夫君，婆罗国大举来犯，我要派百万大军前去迎敌，借我三十亿军费，马上要用。”
李奇：“你上次欠我的十亿还没还呢。”
女帝：“我都有了你的孩子，还要计较这点小钱？”
再然后——
帝国要普及六年义务教育。
帝国要修建覆盖全国的铁路网。
帝国要打造强大的海军舰队。
没钱的女帝，撒娇卖萌讨好，对李奇一次次的掏兜。
李奇崩溃道：“滚！没有了，真的一滴都没有了，别再打我私房钱的主意了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7b979d21106932790fbd069d04bc9519~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"三思两行","author_id":"","book_id":"7342767203214707774","book_name":"帝国崛起：女帝的阳谋大师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1248人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7342767256796922430","read_count":"1248","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"662673"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"199","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,女帝,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a951ed1285a52f13c5a877c9fc56e65f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779255048&x-signature=kQ%2FWLOQiK5QgfT5a5La%2BfrEK3H4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4145598007612704","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.1597546e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321133047996AD9B733C02C5A4123"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":21983,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":43580,"reply_count":0,"sho
